creator: hsu@bbnetworks.net
text:
Firefox menus become corrupt.  They open normally, but when
	you move the cursor down on the menu, the menu contents are
	replaced with graphics from somewhere else, often first it
	becomes black and then starts showing contents of other menus.
	Could be something related to backing store stuff.

	Thunderbird has similar problem.  Is this X or mozilla stuff?

	This happened after upgrading ports couple of weeks ago.
	First I used portupgrade -aPpRr, and after noticing this, I
	checked for orphan includes and libs, and forced compile of
	everything with portupgrade -afpRr, no help.
